ch0291_40_sho/0101_0701_01_10:
[Name:PlayerNickname ]! I could use
your help with something.
ch0291_40_sho/0101_0701_02_10:
I’d like to battle with you so I can deepen
my bond with Manaphy. Would you mind?
ch0291_40_sho/7101_0701_01_10:
In the seas of Pasio, time and space stretch
gently in all directions.
ch0291_40_sho/7101_0701_02_10:
I look toward the edge of the sea—so far
away—and it all feels so beautiful.
ch0291_40_sho/7102_0701_01_10:
Manaphy is born on a cold seafloor and
roams around the open seas.
ch0291_40_sho/7102_0701_02_10:
Such an environment might be even more
unforgiving than Hisui.
ch0291_40_sho/7102_0701_03_10:
Manaphy must be a strong Pokémon to
survive in a place like that!
ch0291_40_sho/7103_0701_01_10:
I’ve seen many people on Pasio living life
to the fullest.
ch0291_40_sho/7103_0701_02_10:
I should follow their example and enjoy my
every second at the beach!
ch0291_40_sho/7104_0701_01_10:
This outfit is nothing like my Survey Corps
uniform. It’ll take some time to adjust.
ch0291_40_sho/7104_0701_02_10:
It’s a little tough to move quickly in this,
but I’ll get the hang of it!
ch0291_40_sho/7105_0701_01_10:
Do you handle hot weather well,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]?
ch0291_40_sho/7105_0701_02_10:
If the heat is wearing you out, I know the
perfect thing.
ch0291_40_sho/7105_0701_04_10:
I found a stall that has delicious snow cones.
Let’s go there and cool down!
ch0291_40_sho/1701_0701_01_10:
I found this near the ocean. Would you
like it?
ch0291_40_sho/1701_0702_01_10:
I hope it helps cool you down when it’s
hot out.
ch0291_40_sho/2501_0701_01_10:
I was looking at Manaphy the other day,
and I remembered something.
ch0291_40_sho/2501_0701_02_10:
It resembles a Pokémon Professor Laventon
saw in Hisui.
ch0291_40_sho/2501_0702_01_10:
I’m putting together what I know about
Manaphy, so I can report that to Professor
Laventon.
ch0291_40_sho/2501_0702_02_10:
After all, it’s the Survey Corps’ job to
research Pokémon!
ch0291_40_sho/2511_0701_01_10: I heard something from Dawn and Lucas.
ch0291_40_sho/2511_0701_02_10:
They said there’s a book in a Sinnoh library
that contains legends about Manaphy.
ch0291_40_sho/2511_0701_03_10:
The book is called “The Sea’s Legend.”
I’d love to get ahold of it and read it!
ch0291_40_sho/2511_0702_01_10:
I don’t know when exactly the folktales were
recorded.
ch0291_40_sho/2511_0702_02_10:
But I do know those from long ago survived
and have been passed down to later
generations.
ch0291_40_sho/2511_0702_03_10:
As a member of the Survey Corps, I feel
so happy just thinking about it.
ch0291_40_sho/3001_0701_01_10:
Good morning! It’s really hot out with the
sun shining so brightly. Be sure to protect
yourself from the heat!
ch0291_40_sho/3003_0701_01_10: Shall we head to the beach to cool down?
ch0291_40_sho/3005_0701_01_10:
Feeling tired? Let’s eat our fill and get plenty
of energy for another long day tomorrow!
